margin.title: Profitability
margin.description: Realized revenue, cost of goods sold, and gross margin for the selected range. Cost comes from the exact lots consumed on each sale, falling back to the product cost when a line is not lot-tracked.
margin.error: The profitability report could not be loaded.

byProduct.title: By product
byProduct.emptyState: There are no completed sales in the selected dates. Adjust the range to see profitability by product.

dayClose.title: Day close
dayClose.description: Review the complete business-day evidence before manager sign-off: sales, tenders, cash sessions, fiscal documents, adjustments, and anomaly signals.
dayClose.error: The day-close report could not be loaded.

readiness.ready: The day is ready for manager review
readiness.blocked: The day still has blocking work

signoff.title: Manager sign-off
signoff.description: Confirm your review to freeze this exact report as the business day's permanent evidence.
signoff.blocked: Resolve the blocking items above before this report can be signed.
signoff.attestation: I reviewed this report and confirm that it represents the business day shown.
signoff.confirmMessage: This action is irreversible. The report for {{date}}, generated at {{generatedAt}}, will be stored exactly as shown and cannot be edited or deleted.
signoff.signedDescription: This screen is showing the immutable signed snapshot. Activity recorded later does not rewrite it.
signoff.pdfUnavailable: This older signed record predates stored PDF artifacts. Its immutable report remains available on this screen.
signoff.pdfDownloadedDescription: The stored artifact passed its size and SHA-256 integrity checks.
signoff.pdfDownloadError: The signed PDF could not be verified and downloaded
signoff.successDescription: The immutable report and its audit evidence were saved.
signoff.errorTitle: The day close could not be signed

payments.note: Gross tenders for sales recorded on this day; voids and refunds appear separately under adjustments.

empty.paymentsDescription: No eligible sale tenders were recorded for this business day.

coverage.description: The report stays explicit when a domain has no source model; it never converts missing evidence into a false zero.

commissions_not_tracked.title: Commissions
commissions_not_tracked.description: Commission plans are not modeled yet, so this report marks the section unavailable instead of reporting zero.

waste_not_tracked.title: Waste
waste_not_tracked.description: Waste events are not modeled yet, so this report marks the section unavailable instead of hiding the gap.
